text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Kikuka Sho, and the paddock is
extremely lively.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day... I'm finally going to catch up to
Bourbon! No!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think Rice Shower really changed over
the summer?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I heard Bourbon pretty much called Rice her rival
at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Maybe... Just maybe she might be able to...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm going to change today! No matter what!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
But still, whenever I look at Mihono Bourbon...
You know!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know. The long distance is a bit
concerning, but I heard she's done a lot of incline
training!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I detect an incredible amount of pressure from
Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition... Tannhauser's development is clear
at a glance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have determined that I must execute my mission
without letting my guard down for a moment.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I won't give up the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wow! Bourbon and Rice are so cool.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And Rice seems suuuper prepared for today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm definitely gonna have to work hard
today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okaaay! Gotta turn it up to 110 percent and take
home the victory! Ei, ei, mun!
